name: Trout with Cream and Honey Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the almonds.
2. Prepare the trout by washing and drying it thoroughly. Soak in milk for 5-10 minutes.
3. Season the trout with the seasoned flour.
4. Melt half the butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
5. Fry the trout for 5-7 minutes on each side until golden brown.
6. Make the sauce by melting the remaining butter in another small saucepan.
7. Add the chopped almonds to the sauce and sauté for a few minutes until lightly toasted.
8. Stir in the honey and lemon juice, then carefully bring to a simmer.
9. Gradually add the heavy cream while continuously stirring to ensure it doesn't curdle.
10. Pour the sauce over the fried trout and garnish with fresh lemon slices before serving.
